title: Superior Pack of 50 Aluminium Foil Containers with Lids - 0.5L Meal Prep Food Trays, Foil Trays for Baking, Roasting, Takeaway containers & Storage - Oven Safe, Leak Resistant
features: CONVENIENT MEAL PREP & STORAGE – Perfect for batch cooking, storing leftovers, or packing up food for events. These 0.5-litre foil trays are ideal for individual portions or side dishes.
OVEN & FREEZER SAFE – Crafted from premium-grade aluminium, our foil containers are safe to use in the oven and freezer, making them versatile for cooking, reheating, or storing food.
RECYCLABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY – Made from 100% recyclable aluminium. Simply rinse and recycle after use – great for home or catering with minimal waste.
DURABLE & LEAK-RESISTANT – No more spills or soggy containers. Superior’s foil trays are sturdy, hold their shape, and are leak-resistant even with sauces and oily dishes.
MULTIPURPOSE USE – Ideal for home kitchens, takeaways, food stalls, BBQs, picnics, and professional catering. Use them for curries, pasta, rice, desserts, or freezer meals.
description: Whether you’re a busy parent meal prepping for the week, a small food business packing up takeaways, or just need a reliable way to store leftovers – Superior 0.5L Aluminium Foil Containers are your go-to solution. Designed for efficiency, cleanliness, and performance , each tray is crafted from high-quality aluminium foil that’s oven safe, freezer safe, and fully recyclable . The compact 500ml size is perfect for individual portions, side dishes, or desserts. These disposable food trays with lids help keep food fresh, hot, and secure during transport – whether for packed lunches, takeaway orders, or event catering. They’re a great alternative to plastic containers and help reduce cleanup time. Order your Superior foil containers today – a kitchen essential for convenience without compromise.
